summary: Iteration 14: Dashboard Enhancements & AI Categorization Bug Fix testing complete. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified: clickable dashboard panels navigate to /transactions with URL params, chart type selectors (Bar/Line/Area for trend, Pie/Bar for expense), pie chart shows percentage labels on slices and in legend, Transactions page reads URL params and pre-applies filters, Clear Filters button works.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/analytics/summary - returns income/expense/trends data
Backend: GET /api/analytics/summary with date range filters
Backend: GET /api/analytics/summary - requires auth (401 without)
Backend: GET /api/accounts - returns accounts list
Backend: GET /api/accounts - requires auth
Backend: GET /api/categories - returns categories list
Backend: GET /api/categories - requires auth
Backend: GET /api/transactions - returns transactions list
Backend: GET /api/transactions - requires auth
Backend: GET /api/vouchers - returns vouchers list
Backend: GET /api/vouchers - requires auth
Backend: POST /api/ai-categorize - endpoint exists and requires auth
Backend: POST /api/ai-categorize - returns response with categorized_count
Backend: Category breakdown has required fields (category, amount, type)
Backend: Monthly trend has required fields (month, income, expense)
Backend: Daily trend has required fields (day, income, expense)
Backend: Top creditors/debitors have description and amount
Frontend: Dashboard loads with 5 summary cards (Balance, Income, Expenses, Net Savings, Savings Rate)
Frontend: Period selector present with options (All Time, This Month, Last Month, This FY, Last FY, Custom Range)
Frontend: Custom Range shows date inputs and Apply button
Frontend: Trend chart type selector buttons (Bar, Line, Area) present and functional
Frontend: Expense breakdown chart type selector (Pie, Bar) present and functional
Frontend: Pie chart shows percentage labels on slices (74%, 14%, 5%)
Frontend: Legend shows percentage badges next to each category (73.7%, 13.6%, 4.6%, 1.8%)
Frontend: Clicking Income card navigates to /transactions?type=credit
Frontend: Clicking Expense card navigates to /transactions?type=debit
Frontend: Clicking category legend navigates to /transactions with search param
Frontend: Clicking Top Spends item navigates to /transactions with search param
Frontend: Clicking Top Income Sources item navigates to /transactions with search param
Frontend: Clicking Account Summary card navigates to /transactions with search param
Frontend: Transactions page reads URL params (type, search, dateFrom, dateTo) and pre-applies filters
Frontend: Clear Filters button resets URL params and filter inputs
critical_code_review_comments: AI categorization chunking implemented correctly - processes in chunks of 80 transactions (line 126 in helpers.py)
to_list limits increased from 500 to 5000 for transactions in upload.py, ai.py, email_sync.py
Dashboard.js uses useNavigate with URLSearchParams for clickable panel navigation
Transactions.js uses useSearchParams to read URL params on mount
Pie chart renderPieLabel function shows percentage on slices > 3%
Legend items show percentage badges with proper formatting
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 14 verified Dashboard Enhancements: 1) Clickable summary cards navigate to /transactions with type param (credit/debit), 2) Clickable category legend, Top Spends, Top Income Sources, Account Summary all navigate to /transactions with search param, 3) Chart type selectors work (Bar/Line/Area for trend, Pie/Bar for expense breakdown), 4) Pie chart shows percentage labels on slices and in legend, 5) Transactions page reads URL params (type, search, dateFrom, dateTo) and pre-applies filters, 6) Clear Filters button works. AI categorization bug fix verified - processes in chunks of 80 transactions. All 17 backend tests passed. All frontend features working correctly.
